plan.failureSummary: The deterministic cache for page.ai is stale. It attempted to fill a 'Last Name' field using cached selectors, but the application is currently displaying a different UI variant ('Set 2') that lacks that field.
observedIndicators: The failing tool call attempted to interact with 'Last Name' which is not visible in the failure screenshot
Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' badge, indicating a UI variant change
Historical pass rate is ~50% with alternating success/failure, typical of rotating UI variants and stale cache issues

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and re-run. The autonomous agent will identify the new fields in 'Set 2' and complete the survey dynamically.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic mode for this dynamic test case
remediationSteps.details: Since this application frequently rotates UI variants, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific page.ai call (e.g., using { mode: 'autonomous' }) to ensure it always adapts to the current form structure.

plan.notes: The application appears to be intentionally unstable or A/B testing different form variants. The failure screenshot explicitly shows a 'Set 2' badge and a different set of fields ('Your Name', 'Contact Email') compared to what the cached tool call was expecting ('Last Name'). Since the semantic intent is broad ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache will allow the agent to adapt to the current UI variant.
